topics.name: 100–200 Level: Pre-clinical Sciences — Anatomy, Physiology, and Biochemistry
topics.description: ANA 101 Gross Anatomy, PHS 211 Physiology I, BCH 211 Medical Biochemistry.

subtopics.name: ANA 101 & ANA 211: Human Gross and Microscopic Anatomy (CMUL)
objectives: Identify and describe the structures of musculoskeletal, cardiovascular, respiratory, and neurological systems
Interpret histological slides of major organ systems in practicals at College of Medicine UNILAG (CMUL)

subtopics.name: PHS 211 & BCH 211: Physiology and Medical Biochemistry
objectives: Explain homeostatic mechanisms regulating cardiovascular, renal, and endocrine function
Describe metabolic pathways including glycolysis, Krebs cycle, beta-oxidation, and amino acid catabolism

topics.name: 300 Level: Pathology, Microbiology, Pharmacology, and Clinical Introduction
topics.description: PATH 301 General Pathology, MIC 311 Medical Microbiology, PHAR 321 Pharmacology I, CL 331 Clinical Introduction.

subtopics.name: PATH 301 & MIC 311: Pathology and Medical Microbiology
objectives: Describe mechanisms of cell injury, inflammation, neoplasia, and common tropical diseases
Identify bacterial, viral, fungal, and parasitic pathogens of clinical importance in Nigeria

subtopics.name: PHAR 321 & CL 331: Pharmacology and Introduction to Clinical Skills
objectives: Explain pharmacokinetics, pharmacodynamics, and adverse drug reactions for essential medicines
Take a structured clinical history and perform basic physical examination in CMUL clinical skills lab

topics.name: 400–600 Level: Clinical Rotations — Medicine, Surgery, Paediatrics, O&G, and Electives
topics.description: CL 401 Medicine, CL 411 Surgery, CL 421 Paediatrics, CL 431 Obs & Gynae, CL 599 Final MBBS.

subtopics.name: CL 401 & CL 411: Internal Medicine and Surgery Rotations at LUTH
objectives: Diagnose and manage common medical conditions including malaria, diabetes, hypertension, and HIV/AIDS
Assist in surgical procedures, wound management, and post-operative care at Lagos University Teaching Hospital (LUTH)

subtopics.name: CL 599: Final MBBS Professional Examinations
objectives: Pass written, OSCE, and oral professional examinations in medicine, surgery, paediatrics, and O&G
Demonstrate clinical competence required for provisional registration with the Medical and Dental Council of Nigeria (MDCN)
